620 X0900B_MDFCTN_ENTRY_ERR_CD X0900B_MDFCTN_ENTRY_ERR_CD X0900B Reason for Modification: Data Entry Error Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates the reason for modification of the prior erroneous record is related to a data entry error. 0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern) effective
